title: centaurea × ceballosii var. andresiana
intro: Centaurea × ceballosii var. andresiana, also known as a variety of the Ceballos' cornflower, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Centaurea, belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Centaurea × ceballosii var. andresiana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
